reference: This vaccination prevents pneumococcal infection, which is a cause of pneumonia, meningitis, and other infections. It costs one,three hundred Indian Rupees per injection. If your financial situation allows, you should proceed with it.
text: This vaccination prevents pneumococcal infection, which is a cause of pneumonia, meningitis, and other infections. It costs 1,300 Indian rupees per injection. If your financial situation allows, you should proceed with it.
